Non-Tentpole Content
OTHER
▼
21 Pieces of Content (7 Longform, 14 Shortform) Distribution Points Hit: TKTK Ad Spots Available: TKTK
💬
Talkin' Baseball
💬
  • Social💬
    In-season: Mon/Wed/Fri — Mon & Fri full ~50-90 min episodes (NL/AL Burns, Standings, Standout Performances, En Fuego, Struggling Batters, Injury Update, Awards); Wed is shorter/lighter.
  • Social💬
    Off-season: Mon/Wed — same conversational format, reduced cadence.
Baseball Today
💬
  • Social💬
    In-season: Mon–Fri daily, ~45-50 min conversational show (Chris Rose & Trevor Plouffe).
  • Social💬
    Off-season: 2x/week, reduced cadence.
Talkin' Yanks
💬
  • Live💬
    In-season: Series Recap Thu+Sun, 70-80 min livestreamed, fixed segment order.
  • Social💬
    In-season: Midweek/Boone Tue, 45-60 min, built around the weekly Aaron Boone interview.
  • Social💬
    Off-season: Tue/Thu, ~60 min, conversational, no fixed segments.
Talkin' Giants
💬
  • Social💬
    In-season: 3 eps/week — postgame recap (QB/Offense/Defense Report), Thursday preview w/ Touchdown Draft, Monday midweek show. ~50-70 min.
  • Social💬
    Off-season: 2 eps/week (Mon/Thu) — Topic of the Day, interviews, ~monthly mailbag, Camp Battles, Over/Unders, 53-Man Roster Predictions.
Wake n' Jake
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, Mon & Wed, no off-season break. ~1 hour. Recurring: Topic of the Day, Tier Lists & Drafts, Foolish Baseball collabs (~2x/month), Quarterly 'One Minute on the Clock', calendarized annual specials.
Dugout Discussions
💬
  • Social💬
    In-season: weekly, Mondays, ~20-25 min field interview show + rotating secondary segment.
  • Idea Bank💬
    Off-season: hiatus. No standard format.
Jomboy's Breakdowns
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, ~3 videos/week, reactive/event-driven, 3-12 min each. Spinoffs: Breakdown Shorts, Breakdown Archives.
We Got Ice
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, weekly. Main channel: AT-BATS / CURVEBALLS / Collab Content challenge formats. Second channel 'Jack and Zo': emerging formats.
Jolly Olive
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, weekly (Saturday mornings). Baseball-history video essay across 5 lanes: The Trading Block, The Coaster, (Re)Living Baseball, Deal Points, Forgotten Jerseys.
JM Baseball Trivia
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, Mon–Thu (4/week), 20-30 min. Mon=Drafts (season-long), Tue=Pinpoint, Wed/Thu=rotating formats.
Things You Missed
💬
  • YouTube💬
    Year-round, weekly (Sundays), ~10 min. 4-5 moments from off-mainstream-radar sports. Sold at 3 eps/month.
